full_text:
Wen Hu 文虎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wen Hu (文虎). Son of Wen Qin and brother of Wen Yang. Followed his brother everywhere. Wen Hu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom, Zhuge Dan, and the Jin Dynasty.
